response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video, identified the performer (Otonose Kanade) and event title (IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026). 2. Noted the song title '飛行艇' (Hikoutei) via on-screen credit. 3. Confirmed the original composer as Daiki Tsuneta (of King Gnu). 4. Performed a search for '飛行艇 King Gnu lyrics'. 5. Retrieved the full Japanese lyrics from UtaTen. 6. Translated the lyrics to English for the final output. 7. Mapped the scenes based on the vocal performance start and end times.
response.global_summary: A video featuring Otonose Kanade performing '飛行艇' (Hikoutei) during her 'IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026' event. The performance includes live band accompaniment and impressive stage lighting effects.

scenes.description: Introductory title card for 'Otonose Kanade IN PROGRESS BIRTHDAY LIVE 2026', followed by an instrumental intro.
Otonose Kanade performs the song '飛行艇' (Hikoutei). The stage is filled with laser effects and a blimp with the event name. The performance continues with dancers in black hooded outfits.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
どんな夢を見に行こうか
正しさばかりに恐れ戦かないで
自由自在に飛び回って
ステップ・バイ・ステップ
ビートを刻んで
果ての無いパーティーを続けようか
この時代に飛び乗って
今夜この街を飛び立って
大空を飛び回って
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
この風に飛び乗って
今夜台風の目となって
大空を飛び回って
命揺らせ 命揺らせ

代わり映えしない日常の片隅で
無邪気に笑っていられたらいいよな
無意味な旅を続けたって
ワン・バイ・ワン
一歩ずつでいいさ
歓声も罵声も呑み込んで

この時代に飛び乗って
今夜愚かな杭となって
過ちを恐れないで
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
この風に飛び乗って
今夜名も無き風となって
清濁を併せ呑んで
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
大雨降らせ
大地震わせ
過去を祝え
明日を担え
命揺らせ 命揺らせ

貴女の期待に飛び乗って
今夜この羽根で飛びたくて
この大空を飛びたくて
命生まれ 命生まれ
この風に飛び乗って
今夜名も無き風となって
清濁を併せ呑んで
命揺らせ 命揺らせ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What kind of dreams should we go see?
Don't be afraid and tremble only at correctness
Fly around freely
Step by step
Beat by beat
Shall we continue the endless party?
Jump onto this era
Tonight, fly away from this city
Fly around the big sky
Shake your life, shake your life
Jump onto this wind
Tonight, become the eye of the typhoon
Fly around the big sky
Shake your life, shake your life

In the corner of this unchanging daily life
It would be nice to be able to laugh innocently
Continue this meaningless journey
One by one
One step at a time is fine
Swallow both cheers and boos

Jump onto this era
Tonight, become the foolish stake
Don't be afraid of mistakes
Shake your life, shake your life
Jump onto this wind
Tonight, become the nameless wind
Swallow both the pure and the impure
Shake your life, shake your life
Make the heavy rain fall
Make the earth tremble
Celebrate the past
Carry tomorrow
Shake your life, shake your life

Jump onto your expectations
Tonight, I want to fly with these wings
I want to fly in this big sky
Life is born, life is born
Jump onto this wind
Tonight, become the nameless wind
Swallow both the pure and the impure
Shake your life, shake your life
